allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bin:', d.get\('bin'\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.surveycake.com/s/4oeWy")

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: application/json' https://www.surveycake.com/api/v1/survey/__TRACKED_VAR__)

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) title = d.get\('result', {}\).get\('title', ''\) or d.get\('title', ''\) or d.get\('name', ''\) or str\(d\)[:120] status = d.get\('result', {}\).get\('status', ''\) or d.get\('status', ''\) or '?' closed = d.get\('result', {}\).get\('is_close', ''\) or d.get\('is_close', ''\) or '?' print\(f'title={title!r} status={status} is_close={closed}'\) except: raw = sys.stdin.read\(\) if hasattr\(sys.stdin, 'read'\) else '\(parse error\)' print\('parse error:', sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)[:200]\) ")

Bash(curl -v -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: application/json' https://www.surveycake.com/api/v1/survey/4oeWy)
